itemReviewed.name: St Joseph's School - Knowledge Park I

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I had a terrible experience at St. Joseph's School while trying to collect some important documents for college. The receptionist was incredibly rude, and despite explaining the relevance of the documents, the school refused to provide them. This caused a major setback in my plans for further education.

I requested four documents, but the school only provided one, and it was in a completely useless format. When I asked the principal for an explanation, they gave a wild and absurd reason for withholding the documents. This lack of cooperation and professionalism has seriously affected my future educational pursuits.

Overall, my experience with St. Joseph's School was extremely disappointing, and I would caution others against relying on them for essential paperwork or support in their academic endeavours.

itemReviewed.name: St Joseph's School - Knowledge Park I

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I must express my utmost disappointment with St. Joseph's School. Not only does the management exhibit inappropriate behavior, but the principal's demeanor is appalling. During my recent visit to acquire documents essential for college admission, the school denied providing them, causing unnecessary distress and hindrance to my future endeavors. The principal, a complete rascal, appears incapable of comprehending basic human communication.

Also, the school doesn't help students who want to study abroad. They once said ISC students don't need IELTS for foreign universities, which turned out to be wrong. This shows they don't care about students wanting to go abroad.

Besides, students often skip classes, and there's always tension between teachers and the people running the school. It's not a good place for learning.

Overall, I wouldn't recommend St. Joseph's School. They don't do their job properly, and the way they behave is just not acceptable.

itemReviewed.name: St Joseph's School - Knowledge Park I

itemListElement.reviewBody: A well maintained Modern School with Quality education 🎓

itemReviewed.name: St Joseph's School - Knowledge Park I

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I am writing to express my deep disappointment and concern regarding the quality of education and treatment of students at St. Joseph school.

As a parent of a student in the nursery or kg section, I have observed and experienced several instances of irresponsible and rude behavior from the teachers in these classes. It is disheartening to see that the individuals entrusted with the responsibility of nurturing and educating young children are failing to demonstrate the expected qualities of politeness, kindness, and empathy.

Furthermore, I find the principal and staff to be similarly dismissive and unhelpful when addressing these concerns. Instead of fostering a positive and supportive environment, it appears that the school is primarily driven by financial gains, with little regard for the holistic development of our children. This approach undermines the vision of providing a well-rounded education that focuses on the 360° development of students.

The pathetic state of the school's infrastructure and classrooms only adds to the overall disappointment. It is disconcerting to witness a lack of investment in creating a conducive learning environment for our children. A school's physical infrastructure plays a vital role in facilitating a positive and engaging learning experience, and its current state falls far short of expectations.

Moreover, there have been reports of mistreatment and unfair behavior towards nursery and kg students. It is distressing to think that our young and impressionable children are being subjected to such treatment, which can have a detrimental impact on their self-esteem, confidence, and overall emotional well-being. This goes against the fundamental principles of early childhood education, which should prioritize creating an inclusive and supportive environment for our little ones.

As parents, we entrust our children to your care with the expectation that they will receive a quality education in a safe, nurturing, and respectful environment. It is disheartening to see these expectations not being met.
